facebook.content:
"But you will receive power when the Holy Spirit comes on you; and you will be my witnesses in Jerusalem, and in all Judea and Samaria, and to the ends of the earth." – Acts 1:8

The time has come for us to boldly declare Jesus' authority over every sphere of life, not just the church. As His witnesses, we carry the light of His kingdom into a dark world, bringing transformation and redemption to all nations. The Spirit's power is not an option, but a promise.

instagram.content:
Matthew 28:18 

"All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me."

We often focus on our own authority and position in life, but the truth is, our authority comes from one place: Jesus. His authority is not just a historical fact, but a present reality that demands our allegiance and surrender.

tiktok.content:
"But now, thus says the Lord, who created you, O Jacob, and He who formed you, O Israel: 'Fear not, for I have redeemed you; I have called you by name, you are mine.' - Isaiah 44:2

You were created for a purpose, and the King of Kings has called you by name.
